quality.rationale: 基于标准球面度规的平行输运问题，涉及测地线方程简化、Christoffel符号计算与一阶线性微分方程组求解，逻辑链条完整且具有明显的曲率几何背景。

origin.question: [文件 1: 1_s7_7.16.md]Problem 7.16. On the surface of a two-sphere, $\mathrm{ds}^2 = \mathrm{d}\theta^2 + \sin^2\theta \mathrm{d}\phi^2$ , the vector $\mathbf{A}$ is equal to $\mathbf{e}_{\theta}$ at $\theta = \theta_0$ , $\phi = 0$ . What is $\mathbf{A}$ after it is parallel transported around the circle $\theta = \theta_0$ ? What is the magnitude of $\mathbf{A}$ ?
origin.solution: Solution 7.16. A is parallel transported along the $\phi$ -coordinate line (i.e., $\theta = \text{constant}$ ), so$$0 = \mathrm {A}_{; \phi}^{\alpha} = \mathrm {A}_{, \phi}^{\alpha} + \Gamma_{\beta \phi}^{\alpha} \mathrm {A}^{\beta}. \tag {1}$$The only nonzero Christoffel symbols are $\Gamma_{\phi \phi}^{\theta} = -\sin \theta \cos \theta$ and $\Gamma_{\theta \phi}^{\phi} = \cot \theta$ , so Equation (1) gives$$\mathbf {A}^{\theta}, \phi - \sin \theta \cos \theta \mathbf {A}^{\phi} = 0 \tag {2}$$$$\mathbf {A}_{, \phi}^{\phi} + \cot \theta \mathbf {A}^{\theta} = 0. \tag {3}$$Throughout this problem, $\theta$ is kept constant at $\theta_0$ . Equations (2) and (3) are easily solved, e.g., by differentiating Equation (2) with respect to $\phi$ :$$\mathbf {A}_{, \phi \phi}^{\theta} = \sin \theta \cos \theta \mathbf {A}_{, \phi}^{\phi} = - \cos^{2} \theta \mathbf {A}^{\theta}.$$The solution then is$$\mathbf {A}^{\theta} = a \cos (\phi \cos \theta) + \beta \sin (\phi \cos \theta)$$where $\alpha, \beta$ are constants. Equation (2) now gives$$\mathbf {A}^{\phi} = - a \sin (\phi \cos \theta) / \sin \theta + \beta \cos (\phi \cos \theta) / \sin \theta .$$At $\phi = 0$ , $\mathbf{A} = \mathbf{e}_{\theta}$ , i.e. $\mathbf{A}^{\theta} = \mathbf{1}$ , $\mathbf{A}^{\phi} = 0$ . Thus $a = 1$ , $\beta = 0$ , and$$\mathbf {A}^{\theta} = \cos (\phi \cos \theta)$$$$\mathbf {A}^{\phi} = - \sin (\phi \cos \theta) / \sin \theta .$$At $\phi = 2\pi$ , after transport around the circle, the vector is$$\mathbf {A} = \cos (2 \pi \cos \theta) \mathbf {e}_{\theta} - \sin (2 \pi \cos \theta) / \sin \theta \mathbf {e}_{\phi} \neq \mathbf {e}_{\theta},$$but the magnitude is unchanged$$(\mathbf {A} \cdot \mathbf {A})_{2 \pi} = \cos^{2} (2 \pi \cos \theta) \mathbf {e}_{\theta} \cdot \mathbf {e}_{\theta} + \sin^{2} (2 \pi \cos \theta) / \sin^{2} \theta \mathbf {e}_{\phi} \cdot \mathbf {e}_{\phi} = 1 = (\mathbf {A} \cdot \mathbf {A})_{0}.$$
